mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'))
AND UPPER(emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'))
AND TO_CHAR(emp_auth) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ( UPPER(emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR TO_CHAR(emp_auth) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR TO_CHAR(emp_auth) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT emp_id AS empId, emp_name AS empName, emp_pw AS empPw, emp_tel AS empTel, emp_email AS empEmail, emp_deptno AS empDeptno, emp_auth AS empAuth, emp_first AS empFirst, emp_inoffice AS empInOffice, emp_hiredate AS empHiredate FROM emp WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%'))
AND UPPER(emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%'))
AND TO_CHAR(emp_auth) LIKE '%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ( UPPER(emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR TO_CHAR(emp_auth) LIKE '%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%' )
AND ( UPPER(emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR TO_CHAR(emp_auth) LIKE '%' || #{adminDTO.searchKeyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY emp_id DESC ) A ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
